title: Lenvoshop Gift Finder
lead: Three quick questions about who you're shopping for and we'll pick three gifts they'll genuinely use. No email, no spam — instant recommendations.

questions.question: What kind of gift feels most you?

options.label: No budget — show me the best

mom-wellness-any.headline: For Mom — the wellness trio
mom-wellness-any.why: Foot massager for tired feet, neck/TMJ device for headaches, ergonomic pillow for actual sleep. Three small problems she's living with that this fixes.

mom-thoughtful-low.headline: For Mom — the cozy starter
mom-thoughtful-low.why: Reading light for late chapters, charming ceramic mug, soft pillowcase. A small bundle of warm-and-quiet upgrades.

mom-practical-any.headline: For Mom — practical relief
mom-practical-any.why: Foot massager + reading light + air purifier. Three things she'll use this week and remember you for.

mom-default.headline: For Mom — solid pick
mom-default.why: Foot massager, reading light, ergonomic pillow. The Mother's Day trio that consistently gets the 'this is the best gift' reaction.

dad-practical-any.headline: For Dad — the toolbox
dad-practical-any.why: Three-in-one laser level + cordless car-wash gun + plug-in power saver. The practical-and-useful trio every dad puts to work the same weekend.

dad-tech-any.headline: For Dad — gadget mode
dad-tech-any.why: Pocket anti-spy detector, privacy pen, GPS pet collar. The 'huh, I didn't know I needed that' lineup.

dad-wellness-any.headline: For Dad — recovery kit
dad-wellness-any.why: Triple Fusion massager for the back, foot massager for tired feet, alarm band for early mornings. For the dad who never says he's hurting.

dad-default.headline: For Dad — practical legend
dad-default.why: Laser level + carwash gun + anti-spy detector. Tools, gadgets, conversation pieces — all under $200.

grandparent-wellness-any.headline: For Grandparents — relief that earns its keep
grandparent-wellness-any.why: Triple Fusion massager + foot massager + neck/TMJ relief. Three real complaints, three quiet fixes.

grandparent-thoughtful-any.headline: For Grandparents — small but loved
grandparent-thoughtful-any.why: Clip-on reading light + anti-snore pillow + charming mug. Daily-use gifts that stay on the nightstand for years.

grandparent-tech-any.headline: For Grandparents — smart and simple
grandparent-tech-any.why: CO/gas detector, vibration alarm band, plug-in power saver. Tech that's helpful without being complicated.

grandparent-default.headline: For Grandparents — the classic
grandparent-default.why: Triple Fusion + foot massager + reading light. The wellness trio we recommend most for parents and grandparents.

self-wellness-any.headline: Treat yourself — the wellness reset
self-wellness-any.why: Triple Fusion massager, anti-snore pillow, reading light. Three 'I deserved this' upgrades you'll use every day.

self-tech-any.headline: Treat yourself — gadget tier
self-tech-any.why: Anti-spy detector, privacy pen, vibration alarm band. Pocket-size clever every traveler appreciates.

self-practical-any.headline: Treat yourself — useful upgrade
self-practical-any.why: Desktop air cooler, ergonomic pillow, reading light. Comfort hits in three rooms.

self-default.headline: Treat yourself — solid trio
self-default.why: Triple Fusion massager, desktop cooler, anti-snore pillow. Three upgrades you'll thank yourself for.

partner-wellness-any.headline: For your partner — couples wellness
partner-wellness-any.why: Triple Fusion + foot massager + anti-snore pillow. Pain relief and a quieter night for both of you.

partner-thoughtful-any.headline: For your partner — the small luxe
partner-thoughtful-any.why: Reading light + soft pillowcase + charming mug. Quiet upgrades to evenings together.

partner-default.headline: For your partner — couples kit
partner-default.why: Triple Fusion massager + reading light + ergonomic pillow. A 'better-evenings' bundle.

friend-thoughtful-low.headline: For a friend — pocket-size charm
friend-thoughtful-low.why: Privacy pen + charming mug + reading light. Three under-$50 picks that earn the genuine 'oh I love this' reaction.

friend-tech-any.headline: For a friend — clever gadget
friend-tech-any.why: Anti-spy detector, privacy pen, vibration alarm band. Travel-friendly, conversation-starting, useful.

friend-default.headline: For a friend — easy win
friend-default.why: Charming mug, reading light, privacy pen. Hard to dislike, easy to wrap.

default.headline: A solid gift trio
default.why: Three picks that consistently get the 'thoughtful' reaction.

title: Build Your Perfect Cooling Setup
lead: Tell us about your space and how you're suffering — we'll pick the three cooling products that'll actually make the next heatwave bearable.

questions.question: Where do you spend the hottest hours?
How big is the space you need to cool?

options.label: Large — open plan or whole apartment

desk-small-noise.headline: Whisper-quiet desk cooling
desk-small-noise.why: Personal air cooler runs quiet enough for video calls, ionic purifier is silent, ergonomic pillow for the heat-disrupted nights.

desk-small-bill.headline: Cool the human, not the room
desk-small-bill.why: Desk cooler + ionic purifier — efficient personal cooling that lets you bump the AC up 5°F. Pays for itself the first month.

desk-default.headline: Desk-warrior cooling kit
desk-default.why: Personal air cooler at the desk, ionic purifier for stale office air, neck fan for the walk to lunch.

bedroom-medium-sleep.headline: Bedroom cooling for sleep
bedroom-medium-sleep.why: Slim tower fan with strong wind output, ergonomic anti-snore pillow, true-HEPA purifier so closed windows don't trap stale air. Sleep through 90°F nights.

bedroom-large-sleep.headline: Whole-bedroom + airflow
bedroom-large-sleep.why: Tower fan as the room circulator, summer cooling fan as the second-zone helper, anti-snore pillow for the sleep itself.

bedroom-default.headline: Sleep cool tonight
bedroom-default.why: Tower fan, ergonomic pillow, HEPA purifier — the bedroom trio.

outside-small-default.headline: Take it with you
outside-small-default.why: Hands-free wearable neck fan + grab-and-go portable + foldable companion fan. Cools the human regardless of room.

outside-default.headline: Outdoor & commute kit
outside-default.why: Neck fan + portable + tower fan for when you finally get home. Three forms of cooling for three settings.

living-large-air.headline: Open-plan living-room cooling
living-large-air.why: Tower fan as the main mover, summer cooling fan as the secondary, true-HEPA purifier for the dust kicked up by both.

living-default.headline: Living-room cooling
living-default.why: Tower fan, summer portable, plug-in ionic purifier. Covers the room and the air quality together.

default.headline: Beat the heat — solid trio
default.why: Personal air cooler, tower fan, neck fan. The cooling trio we recommend most.

title: Which Massager Is Right for Your Body?
lead: Tell us where it hurts, how often, and where you'd use the device — we'll match you with the relief setup that targets exactly that.

questions.question: How often is it bothering you?
Where would you use it most?

options.label: At my desk during the day

back-daily-couch.headline: Daily back-relief routine
back-daily-couch.why: Triple Fusion massager + decompression belt + ergonomic pillow. Heat + EMS + traction in 30 minutes a day. Real difference in a week.

back-daily-bed.headline: Bedtime back reset
back-daily-bed.why: Decompression belt for 20 lying-down minutes, anti-snore pillow for support, Triple Fusion for targeted spots. Wake up unwound.

back-default.headline: Back-pain trio
back-default.why: Triple Fusion + decompression belt + anti-snore pillow. Three angles on lower-back relief.

neck-daily-default.headline: Neck/TMJ everyday relief
neck-daily-default.why: Neck/TMJ device for tension, Triple Fusion for shoulders and traps, ergonomic pillow so you don't undo the work overnight.

neck-default.headline: Neck & shoulders kit
neck-default.why: Targeted heat+vibration for the neck, Triple Fusion for the bigger muscles, pillow for sleep posture.

feet-daily-default.headline: End-of-day foot recovery
feet-daily-default.why: Triple Therapy foot massager + EMS leg pad + reading light for the wind-down. Tired feet, tired legs, calmer evenings.

feet-default.headline: Feet & legs relief
feet-default.why: Foot massager, EMS leg pad, decompression belt. Targets feet, calves, and the sciatic chain together.

joints-default.headline: Joint relief setup
joints-default.why: 2-in-1 wrist & knee massager + Triple Fusion for surrounding muscles + reading light for after.

fatigue-default.headline: Full-body recovery kit
fatigue-default.why: Triple Fusion for the back, foot massager for the legs, anti-snore pillow for the sleep. Whole-body reset.

default.headline: Recovery starter kit
default.why: Triple Fusion massager, foot massager, ergonomic pillow. The relief trio we recommend most.

title: What's Killing Your Sleep?
lead: Most sleep complaints fall into a few clear buckets. Tell us yours and we'll pick the three things most likely to fix it tonight.

options.label: With a pet on the bed

snore-partner-yearround.headline: Snore-free nights for both of you
snore-partner-yearround.why: Anti-snore ergonomic pillow for the source, vibration alarm band so neither of you wakes the other in the morning, HEPA purifier for clean bedroom air.

snore-default.headline: Snore reset
snore-default.why: Anti-snore pillow, HEPA purifier, vibration alarm. Quieter night, gentler morning.

hot-summer-default.headline: Cool bedroom for sleep
hot-summer-default.why: Tower fan with quiet operation, ergonomic anti-snore pillow, ionic purifier for stale closed-window air. Sleep through summer.

hot-default.headline: Cool the bedroom
hot-default.why: Tower fan + anti-snore pillow + air purifier. The bedroom trio for hot nights.

sore-default.headline: Wake up unwound
sore-default.why: Ergonomic anti-snore pillow for cervical support, decompression belt for a 20-minute pre-bed reset, Triple Fusion for tight spots.

fall-default.headline: Wind-down kit
fall-default.why: Reading light with timer (no overhead glare), anti-snore pillow, ionic purifier — calmer environment, easier to fall asleep.

wake-partner-default.headline: Gentle wake-up
wake-partner-default.why: Vibration alarm band wakes you without disturbing your partner, anti-snore pillow for the actual sleep, reading light for early-morning reading without blasting the room.

wake-default.headline: Wake up easier
wake-default.why: Vibration alarm band, anti-snore pillow, reading light. Fix the wake; fix the morning.

default.headline: Sleep reset kit
default.why: Anti-snore pillow, reading light, vibration alarm. Three small upgrades that compound.

title: How Safe Is Your Home, Really?
lead: Quick three-question audit. We'll flag what's missing and recommend the three highest-leverage devices for your specific setup.

questions.question: Do you have any combustion in your home?

options.label: A few things — but old / spread out

gas-nothing-co.headline: Start with the basics
gas-nothing-co.why: Real-time CO/gas detector for the gas appliances, 4-in-1 plug-in for whole-home coverage, HEPA purifier for indoor air. The starter kit every gas-cooking household should own.

gas-default.headline: Gas-home safety kit
gas-default.why: Live PPM CO/gas detector, Pro detector with HD display for the bedroom, fire blanket for the kitchen.

garage-default.headline: Garage + cars covered
garage-default.why: Pro CO detector with HD display (read it from across the garage), real-time gas detector for the kitchen, vibration alarm band so you'll wake to alarms.

fireplace-default.headline: Fireplace household kit
fireplace-default.why: 4-in-1 detector covers CO + gas + smoke + humidity, fire blanket for the hearth, HEPA purifier for the soot fine particulate.

all-electric-air.headline: Air quality + smart safety
all-electric-air.why: True-HEPA purifier for the main living space, ionic purifier for small rooms, ultrasonic insect repellent for chemical-free pest control.

all-electric-default.headline: Smart-home safety
all-electric-default.why: HEPA purifier, vibration alarm band, anti-spy detector. Cleaner air, gentler alerts, traveler-friendly privacy.

fire-default.headline: Kitchen-fire essentials
fire-default.why: Fire blanket for the kitchen, 4-in-1 detector for CO/gas/smoke, HEPA purifier for after-the-fact air cleanup.

privacy-default.headline: Privacy-conscious setup
privacy-default.why: Pocket anti-spy detector, privacy pen for travel, GPS pet collar so the family pet isn't trackable by anyone but you.

default.headline: Home safety starter kit
default.why: Real-time CO/gas detector, true-HEPA purifier, fire blanket. The three devices every home should have.

title: Find the Perfect Mother's Day Gift
lead: Three quick questions about Mom and we'll pick three gifts that genuinely improve her week. Skip the flowers — these last longer.

questions.question: Mom's biggest 'ugh' moment of the week?

options.label: Sore feet at end of day

feet-cozy-any.headline: Spa-day-at-home for Mom
feet-cozy-any.why: Triple Therapy foot massager (heat + EMS + air-compression), reading light for the wind-down, charming mug for morning. Three things she'll use this week.

feet-practical-any.headline: Foot relief, packaged
feet-practical-any.why: Foot massager + EMS leg pad + decompression belt. The full lower-body relief stack for moms on their feet all day.

feet-default.headline: For the achy-feet mom
feet-default.why: Foot massager, reading light, ergonomic pillow.

sleep-cozy-any.headline: Mom's sleep upgrade
sleep-cozy-any.why: Anti-snore ergonomic pillow, soft pillowcase, reading light with timer. Cozy + cervical support + late-night reading without disturbing Dad.

sleep-default.headline: Sleep gift for Mom
sleep-default.why: Anti-snore pillow, reading light, vibration alarm. Better sleep is the gift that compounds.

neck-default.headline: Tension relief for Mom
neck-default.why: Neck/TMJ device, Triple Fusion massager for shoulders, reading light for the wind-down. Headaches go down within a week.

reading-default.headline: For Mom's late-chapter habit
reading-default.why: Clip-on reading light with timer (3 color modes, 30/60-min auto-off), charming mug for morning, soft pillowcase for the bed.

back-default.headline: Mom's back-relief kit
back-default.why: Decompression belt for 20-minute reset, Triple Fusion for tight spots, ergonomic pillow.

default.headline: Solid Mother's Day pick
default.why: Foot massager, reading light, ergonomic pillow. The MD trio that consistently wins.

title: Find the Perfect Father's Day Gift
lead: Skip the novelty mug. Three questions about Dad and we'll pick three gifts he'll actually use long after the weekend.

options.label: The desk warrior (achy at end of day)

fixer-garage-any.headline: For the fixer dad
fixer-garage-any.why: Three-in-one self-leveling laser level, cordless car-wash gun, plug-in power saver. Three useful tools, weekend after weekend.

fixer-yard-any.headline: Yard & garage upgrade
fixer-yard-any.why: Cordless pressure-washer car-wash gun, laser level, energy-saving heater for the garage workshop.

fixer-default.headline: Tools dad will love
fixer-default.why: Laser level, carwash gun, anti-spy detector. The practical-and-useful trio.

traveler-default.headline: For the road-warrior dad
traveler-default.why: Pocket anti-spy detector, privacy pen, vibration alarm band. Clears hotel rooms and keeps mornings quiet.

desk-couch-any.headline: Recovery kit for the desk dad
desk-couch-any.why: Triple Fusion massager + foot massager + decompression belt. Real relief for the desk-bound back.

desk-default.headline: Desk-warrior recovery
desk-default.why: Triple Fusion massager, foot massager, ergonomic pillow. End-of-day relief without a chiropractor.

safety-default.headline: Safety-first dad's kit
safety-default.why: CO/gas detector, anti-spy detector, vibration alarm. Peace-of-mind tools the safety-minded dad will deploy immediately.

pet-default.headline: For the pet-dad
pet-default.why: GPS pet collar, ultrasonic insect repellent, foot massager (post-walk recovery). Three picks for the family who walks the dog.
